user_query: My friends and I are planning a road trip across Europe and we need to stay updated on COVID-19 travel restrictions. Can you provide us with news articles about COVID-19 travel guidelines? It would also be helpful to get a list of hashtags related to COVID-19 travel and the followers of a popular travel Instagram account.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest news articles about COVID-19 travel guidelines across various European countries.
Compile a list of trending hashtags related to COVID-19 travel.
Get the follower count of a specified popular travel Instagram account.
